name: Nizari Progressive
description_short: Nizari Credit Union is an Ismaili-focused credit union in Texas offering personal loans up to $250K, auto loans from 3.99% APR, and business financing including lines of credit up to $100K.
description_long:
Nizari Progressive Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in San Antonio, Texas, serving primarily the Ismaili community. The institution holds NMLS ID 504821 and routing number 113093881, operating under federal credit union regulations. Founded to provide culturally-aligned banking services, Nizari has expanded beyond its community focus to serve business owners and individuals seeking competitive lending rates.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of personal and business financial products. Personal services include auto loans starting at 3.99% APR, personal premier loans up to $250,000, and sweep accounts for interest optimization. Business offerings include share-secured lines of credit up to $100,000, commercial loans, and real estate financing. Members also have access to online banking, LoanPay Xpress payment services, and mechanical repair coverage (MRC) on vehicle loans.

Nizari distinguishes itself through personalized service and responsive staff. Customer testimonials highlight specific loan officers (Narmeen, Tahira, Aasma, Naureen, Serena, Moomal) by name, indicating relationship-focused banking rather than automated processing. The credit union emphasizes transparency in loan procedures, clear communication at each step, and proactive support for commercial borrowers managing complex transactions like real estate closings and inspections.

As a credit union, Nizari's primary advantage is member ownership and potentially lower fees than traditional banks. However, credit union membership typically requires affiliation with the sponsor organization or community, which may limit accessibility. The website lacks transparent fee schedules, APR ranges for personal loans, membership requirements, and minimum account balances. Customer reviews are overwhelmingly positive but self-selected testimonials on the company website cannot substitute for independent verification of service quality or competitive rate analysis. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Share-secured business lines of credit (up to $100,000)
Commercial/business loans with real estate support
Mechanical repair coverage (MRC) on vehicle loans
Certificate of deposit (CDs implied through 'make money while you sleep' messaging)
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 3.99% APR with transparent rate advertising
Personal premier loans up to $250,000, significantly higher than typical personal loan caps
Share-secured business line of credit up to $100,000 for small business owners
Named loan officers and staff in customer testimonials indicate personalized relationship banking
Real estate loan support including assistance with surveys, inspections, appraisals, and document coordination
Sweep account feature to optimize interest earnings on deposits
Multiple service channels including online banking, in-person, and dedicated loan officers
cons: Website does not disclose membership eligibility requirements or if community affiliation is mandatory
No transparent fee schedule, APR ranges for personal loans, or minimum balance requirements listed
Limited information about credit union insurance protections (NCUA coverage limits not mentioned)
All customer testimonials appear on company website only—no independent third-party reviews visible
Grand opening specials mentioned but details behind 'Click for Details' links not accessible in provided content
best_for: Ismaili community members seeking culturally-aligned financial services with personalized attention
Small business owners needing flexible lines of credit and commercial loan support with hands-on guidance
Auto buyers shopping for competitive rates with 3.99% APR or better terms
Individuals seeking personal loans larger than $50,000 up to $250,000 for major purchases or consolidation
diagnosis: Nizari Progressive Credit Union is best for Ismaili community members and small business owners who value personalized loan service and relationship banking over digital-first convenience. The main caveat is that credit union membership may require community or organizational affiliation, and the website provides insufficient transparency about eligibility requirements, fee structures, and APR ranges beyond the headline 3.99% auto rate.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
